name: Fibra UNO
summary: Trust FIBRA UNO (竏堙傔ｬﾃｬFibra UNO竏堙傔ｬﾃｮ) was established as a real estate investment trust (Mexican REIT) on January 12, 2011 by Fibra UNO Administraci竏堙可ｬ竕･n, SA de CV, (the 竏堙傔ｬﾃｬTrustor竏堙傔ｬﾃｮ) and Deutsche Bank M竏堙可ｬﾂｩxico, SA, Instituci竏堙可ｬ竕･n de Banca M竏堙可ｬ竏ｫltiple, Divisi竏堙可ｬ竕･n Fiduciaria y Subsidiarias (竏堙傔ｬﾃｬDeutsche Bank M竏堙可ｬﾂｩxico竏堙傔ｬﾃｮ) as Trustee Institution. Fibra UNO began operations in March 2011, and it was mainly incorporated to purchase and own real estate properties in order to lease and develop commercial, industrial and mixed-use properties, as well as office buildings and lands in the Mexican Real Estate Market.
